title: ハッピー☆ラッキー☆カムカム

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While visiting a zoo with Copano Rickey...

text_block_list.name: Familiar Voice
text_block_list.text:
Huwhaa?! Stop right there, monkey! That stuffed
toy is MINE!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hm? That voice is... Fukukitaru?! Let's go check it
out!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
M-my lucky penguin... Spirited away by a
monkey...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I've hit rock-bottom unhappiness! No doubt, my
fortune's going to read...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I-I knew it! The worst luck possible!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hey, Fukukitaru! Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ah! Master Rickey!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I've fallen into a pit of rotten luck! Pleeease, use
your feng shui expertise to pull me out!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I see. So, the stuffed toy you won from the
souvenir store raffle was taken by a monkey, huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... The lottery is all sold out, so I can't even
buy another one. Both my luck and mood are
down the drain!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I understand the situation! Allow me to
solve your problem, Copa-style! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Fukukitaru, your personal trigram is "qian" right?
It seems that your qi today isn't syncing well with
the earth... This means you should avoid things
like mountains, soil, rock, the colors yellow and
brown. And further, the northeast...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's right... this is the zoo's northeastern zone!
Also, the monkey area was built to emulate a
mountain with its rocky formations and bare
earth... Plus, the monkeys are brown... EEEK!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But don't panic! We'll be able to improve your
negative energy flow by weakening the earth's
elemental qi with wood! And since we're at the
zoo...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ta-daaa! Welcome to the bunny corner! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Lush green trees in the eastern corner and rabbits
which symbolize wood! You'll be able to soak up
plenty of positive energy here!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! This is total heaven! As Doto might say,
there was hope for salvation after all!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh. ♪ Wasn't that area just fantastic with all its
greenery and fluffiness?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
U-um... So, now that I've absorbed a bounty of
wood energy, my fortune should soon skyrocket,
right?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well... Of course, I think you've been set on the
path to happiness. But, don't forget that feng shui
is only a method of drawing out positive energy
and harmonizing with your environment.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The rest is up to you! Happiness is something you
need to seize with your own hands! It comes to
those who go forth with a positive mindset!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I-I see...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But I believe in you, Fukukitaru! You're always
earnestly seeking happiness! Plus, I'll be here to
offer my support if you need it. Let's become
happy together!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
O-oh... W-well, hearing that from you makes me
think I actually can!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But, I guess I'll have to accept that I won't be
getting my stuffed toy back.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Nuh-uh, we still have options! Hey, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Let's explain the situation to the staff.

There might be other souvenir stores to look
through.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You're right! Let's at least see if anyone knows
anything. Things might turn out to our benefit!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
I'm really sorry for the trouble! We actually had
another one of those stuffed toys in storage.
Here, I've brought it out for you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I totally didn't think of just asking the staff! You
always know exactly what to do, Master Rickey!
choice_data_list: We're just glad we could help!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So, then, what are you going to do now,
Fukukitaru?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well... I'm still worried about my luck turning bad
again, so I think I'm gonna head back to the
academy before anything else happens.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Aww, what a waste! We bumped into each other,
so we should hang out longer! Come on, it'll be a
lot of fun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Rickey...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I need to think positively and seize
happiness with my own hands.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay... Let's continue hanging out! And actually,
I've barely seen any of the zoo at all. So, I want to
have as much fun as possible while I'm here!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit, Fukukitaru! Let's get going!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of us end up having a pleasant time at
the zoo.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's right! The other souvenir stores should be
located on the zoo map!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. Ah, there's one more location! Let's check
it out!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Found it! And they still have loads of raffle prizes
left!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Which means I'll have to draw another lot. Feng
shui may have helped me out earlier, but my base
luck is still through the floor...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It'll be fine! You've got both feng shui and us on
your side! If you just believe in yourself and act
positively, you'll seize that happiness!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Master! Y-you're right. Think positively... I'm
here to win!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: O-one more time!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'm not finished yet!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: This time for sure!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I-I did it! I got another lucky penguin!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I see now—having a positive mindset is super
important for achieving happiness. It's all thanks
to your words of support, Rickey!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I merely showed you the path of feng shui! It was
you who beckoned the happiness to yourself,
Fukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru's face lights up with pride
upon hearing Copano Rickey's response.
